name: Houpu Clean Energy Co., Ltd.
summary: Houpu Clean Energy Co., Ltd. provides clean energy equipment solutions in China. The company also offers refueling solutions in clean energy applications; platform operation and supervision services based on Internet, cloud computing, and big data analysis; CRM and PLM system based site operation and maintenance services; and energy chemical engineering consulting, survey, engineering, construction, installation, and project management services. It provides compressed natural gas (CNG) filling station station-level management systems, intelligent gun detachment detection devices, electric control cabinets, CNG program control panels, CNG verification devices, CNG universal intelligent gas dispensers, verification devices of liquefied natural gas (LNG) dispensers, L-CNG trunk-type skid-mounted filling equipment, L-CNG/CNG filling stations, LNG filling stations, LNG fully skid-mounted filling devices, unattended skid-mounted filling devices, LNG filling machines, and LNG station control systems for vehicles. The company also offers LNG fuel-powered ship supply systems, mobile LNG filling stations, gas supply systems, and barges LNG filling stations for marine applications; LNG tanker gas supply skids, LNG gas supply skids, LNG dewar flask gas supply skids, LNG split gas supply skids, and LNG fixed civil stations for civil applications; and hydrogen station control systems and dispensers, and hydrogenation skid-mounted equipment; and components. The company was formerly known as Chengdu Huaqi Houpu Holding Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Houpu Clean Energy Co., Ltd. in August 2019. Houpu Clean Energy Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China.
